meta.title: Dhyana Villas | Luxury Boutique Villas in Koh Phangan, Thailand
meta.description: Discover tranquility at Dhyana Villas — 3 private pool villas nestled in tropical gardens, steps from Hin Kong Beach, Koh Phangan.

hero.subtitle: Private pool villas in the heart of Koh Phangan

intro.title: Welcome to Dhyana Villas
intro.body: Nestled among lush tropical gardens in Hin Kong, Koh Phangan, Dhyana Villas offers an intimate retreat where contemporary design meets the natural beauty of Thailand. Our three private villas provide the perfect sanctuary for those seeking peace, comfort, and authentic island living.
intro.hosts: Your hosts, Jackie & Frank, are dedicated to making your stay unforgettable.

villas.title: The Villas
villas.subtitle: Three unique havens, each with its own private pool

experience.title: The Experience
experience.subtitle: Discover the beauty of Koh Phangan
experience.beachDesc: A 4-minute walk from your villa to pristine sands
experience.waterfallDesc: Explore the island's most beautiful waterfall, just 4.5 km away
experience.yogaDesc: World-class yoga retreats and wellness centers nearby
experience.divingDesc: Crystal clear waters and vibrant coral reefs to explore
experience.templesDesc: Visit sacred temples and immerse in Thai culture
experience.marketsDesc: Experience authentic Thai street food and local crafts

booking.title: Book Your Stay
booking.subtitle: Choose your preferred platform to reserve your villa

footer.address: Moo 6, Hin Kong Road, 84280 Hinkong, Koh Phangan, Thailand
